title: neottia picta
intro: Neottia picta, also known as the painted ladies' lips or painted lady's lips orchid, is a species of orchid native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in China and Japan, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Neottia picta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
